creator: alex@kapran.bitmcnit.bryansk.su
text:
www/p5-Apache was axed, but www/mod_perl is fully-functional
	now (thanks to Sheldon Hearn) so let p5-HTML-Embperl depend on
	proper port.

Fix: This is a quick-response-type fix. I'm working on a major revamp of
the port which is not ready yet. (And yes, I'll update the port to
1.3.1 then)
How-To-Repeat: 	`make index' in /usr/ports as noted and worked around by Steve Price.
	Thanks, Steve.
